name: Lemon-Garlic Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and cut the chicken.
2. Combine the chicken with the remaining ingredients in a crockpot.
3. Set to low heat.
4. When you return from work, debone the chicken.
5. Serve over rice.
6. If freezing chicken pieces separately and mixing other ingredients the night before, dump everything together quickly in the morning. Starting with frozen chicken prevents it from falling apart.
